subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath guided all unto His path, taught all to know Him, and honored all through His grace and bounties [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی هدی الکل الی سبیله و علم الکل عرفانه و شرف الکل بفضله و الطافه
subcodes.subjects: @petitions to authorities, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @business; financial; property matters
